pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) states 'the course "Introduction to Programming" (CS101)'; setup_task.sh (line 25) queries WHERE shortname='CS101'; export_result.sh (line 77) uses this course ID

Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'Name: "CodePractice Pro"'; export_result.sh (line 49) queries WHERE name LIKE '%CodePractice Pro%'; verifier.py (line 37-38) uses this as expected tool name

Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'Tool URL: "https://codepractice.example.com/lti/launch"'; export_result.sh (line 49) extracts the URL from created tool; verifier.py (line 38) compares against this value

Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'Consumer key: "moodle-cs101-2024"'; export_result.sh (line 71) queries mdl_lti_types_config for 'resourcekey'; verifier.py (line 39) expects this exact value
Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'Shared secret: "secretkey2024abc"'; export_result.sh (line 72) queries mdl_lti_types_config for 'password'; verifier.py (line 40) expects this exact value

Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'Activity name: "Week 3: Python Loops Practice"'; export_result.sh (line 77) queries WHERE name LIKE '%Python Loops Practice%'; verifier.py (line 41) uses this as expected activity name

privileged_info_summary: This task configures an LTI (Learning Tools Interoperability) tool in Moodle LMS. All metadata values are confirmed specifications from the task description: a preconfigured external tool named 'CodePractice Pro' with URL https://codepractice.example.com/lti/launch, consumer key 'moodle-cs101-2024', and shared secret 'secretkey2024abc' will be registered at site level; then an LTI activity named 'Week 3: Python Loops Practice' will be added to the CS101 course. The data is entirely synthetic (example/test values) with no external data sources. All values are consistent across task description, setup/export scripts, and verifier logic.
